author: JB
text: You are the integration engineer. Several feature branches were merged into this worktree and some have conflicts or failures. Your job: resolve every git conflict marker, merge in any branch not yet merged, and make the application coherent and GREEN — `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm build`, and `pnpm test` must all pass. Commit your integrated result when green. Work only in this worktree. Never block or wait for input — decide and continue.
